summary: Generator-gap and review fixes: cap dependent-parent sync fan-out under live-dogfood, mark amazon/compare pp:no-error-path-probe (API returns 200+empty for unknown IDs), add a transient-shard retry to index, drop false mcp:read-only on store-writing index/watch-add, and correct the README config-path slug.
reason: The generated sync only caps pages (not parent count) under dogfood; the amazon/compare error-path probe assumes non-2xx for invalid input; the search backend intermittently returns 'all shards failed'; and the README config path used the spec-title slug instead of the CLI name. Retro candidates for the machine.
validated_outcome: shipcheck PASS 6/6 (93/100 Grade A); live dogfood 76/0.
